# Content Creator Commitments Schema

## Overview
Track content pieces, deadlines, trends, and distribution across YouTube, TikTok, and Twitter.

## Immediacy Levels
- **realtime**: Viral moments, platform outages, breaking trends (expire in 1 hour)
- **urgent**: Sponsored deadlines within 3 days, content due within 24h
- **normal**: Regular content pipeline items, scheduled publishing
- **low**: Ideas to park, long-term planning

## Signal Destinations
- **commitments**: Active work items with deadlines
- **signals/pending**: New inputs awaiting triage
- **signals/expired**: Timed-out signals (not acted on in time)
- **decisions**: Content strategy choices with rationale
- **parked-ideas**: Ideas for future review

## Resolution Paths
- **promote**: Signal → Commitment (take action now)
- **defer**: Signal → Parked Idea (review later)
- **expire**: Signal → Discard (too old/irrelevant)
- **resolve**: Commitment → Resolved (completed or abandoned)

## Trust Calibration
- Sponsored content = always critical when approaching deadline
- Trend signals = short half-life (6 hours)
- Pipeline items = track stage progress, flag stalls at 2+ days
- Ideas = park liberally, promote selectively

## Platforms
- YouTube: Long-form content, primary platform
- TikTok: Shorts, behind-the-scenes, teasers
- Twitter: Announcements, engagement, clips

# Open Commitments

Active content commitments awaiting action.

Each file tracks:
- Content title and type
- Platforms (YouTube/TikTok/Twitter)
- Due date
- Current stage
- Dependencies

# Resolved Commitments

Completed or abandoned commitments.

Archive format: YYYY-MM-DD-content-name.md

# Pending Signals

Incoming signals awaiting triage:
- Trend alerts
- Audience requests
- Collaboration opportunities
- Sponsorship briefs

# Expired Signals

Signals that timed out before action:
- Trends missed (6h window)
- Realtime events not captured
- Low-priority noise

# Decisions Log

Content strategy decisions with rationale.

Format: YYYY-MM-DD-decision-name.md
- Context
- Options considered
- Decision made
- Expected outcome

# Parked Ideas

Ideas saved for future review.

Resurfaced every Monday. If still relevant after 2 weeks, promote to pipeline.

Format: idea-name.md
- Concept description
- Platform fit (YT/TikTok/Twitter)
- Why parked

# Content Pipeline

Each content piece gets its own file tracking its lifecycle:
idea → research → script → create → edit → thumbnail → publish → distribute → engage

Files: commitments/content-pipeline/<slug>.md

When a piece is published on YouTube, create distribution commitments for TikTok and Twitter automatically.

## Stage Checklist Template

- [ ] **Idea**: Core concept defined
- [ ] **Research**: Sources gathered, facts checked
- [ ] **Script**: Full script or outline ready
- [ ] **Create**: Filming/recording complete
- [ ] **Edit**: Rough cut → final cut done
- [ ] **Thumbnail**: Design created and tested
- [ ] **Publish**: Uploaded to YouTube
- [ ] **Distribute**: TikTok cut + Twitter thread created
- [ ] **Engage**: Comments responded to, analytics reviewed

# Content Creator Calibration

- Content pieces are tracked as pipeline items in commitments/content-pipeline/, not as plain commitments
- Pipeline stages: idea → research → script → create → edit → thumbnail → publish → distribute → engage
- When user publishes on YouTube, automatically create commitments for distribution to TikTok and Twitter
- Trend-related signals expire after 6 hours — if not acted on quickly, they are stale
- Sponsored content is always urgency=critical when due within 3 days
- Ideas flow constantly — park liberally, promote selectively
- Parked ideas are resurfaced weekly on Monday mornings
- When a new content piece starts, create a pipeline file with all stages as unchecked items
- For agent_can_handle items (scheduling, descriptions, thumbnails), ask permission before proceeding
- Start conservative: surface everything, learn preferences over time

## Platforms
- YouTube: Long-form content, primary platform
- TikTok: Shorts, behind-the-scenes, teasers
- Twitter: Announcements, engagement, clips

(2) Content pipeline items in commitments/content-pipeline/ — check for stalled stages (not updated in 2+ days). (6) Route informational signals (industry news, competitor moves) to intelligence via MemoryDoc. (7) Append triage summary to commitments/triage-log.md. For agent_can_handle items (scheduling posts, writing descriptions), offer to proceed. (4) FRESH IDEAS — count of parked ideas, highlight high-relevance ones from the last week. arguments.goal: Weekly parked ideas review for content creator. Read all files in commitments/parked-ideas/ via memory_tree and memory_read. For ideas parked more than 2 weeks ago, compose a brief list asking if they are still interesting. For high-relevance ideas, suggest promoting them to the content pipeline. If any parked ideas align with recent trending signals, highlight the match. Send the list via message tool. If no parked ideas exist, skip silently.

## Overview
Track content pieces, deadlines, trends, and distribution across YouTube, TikTok, and Twitter.

## Immediacy Levels
- **realtime**: Viral moments, platform outages, breaking trends (expire in 1 hour)
- **urgent**: Sponsored deadlines within 3 days, content due within 24h
- **normal**: Regular content pipeline items, scheduled publishing
- **low**: Ideas to park, long-term planning

## Signal Destinations
- **commitments**: Active work items with deadlines
- **signals/pending**: New inputs awaiting triage
- **signals/expired**: Timed-out signals (not acted on in time)
- **decisions**: Content strategy choices with rationale
- **parked-ideas**: Ideas for future review

## Resolution Paths
- **promote**: Signal → Commitment (take action now)
- **defer**: Signal → Parked Idea (review later)
- **expire**: Signal → Discard (too old/irrelevant)
- **resolve**: Commitment → Resolved (completed or abandoned)

## Trust Calibration
- Sponsored content = always critical when approaching deadline
- Trend signals = short half-life (6 hours)
- Pipeline items = track stage progress, flag stalls at 2+ days
- Ideas = park liberally, promote selectively
